description: Permanent exclusion list of EIPs observed triggering upstream-API risk-blocks (Anthropic / OpenAI / Google / etc.). Any future allocate-address that returns one of these MUST immediately release-address and re-allocate. Source of truth for docs/deploy/tokenkey-edge-ip-history.md § 2. Update via the replacement runbook (§ 4 step 8) of the same doc.
